mapper.select: SELECT count(*) num FROM store_goods_order t1 WHERE
SELECT count(DISTINCT merchant_id) num FROM store_goods_order t1 WHERE

SELECT count( DISTINCT goods_id ) num FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2 WHERE
AND t1.order_id = t2.order_id

SELECT count( DISTINCT spu_no ) num FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2 WHERE
AND t1.order_id = t2.order_id

SELECT sum(IFNULL(sorting_quantity,quantity)) quantity, spu_no spuno FROM ( SELECT t2.spu_no, t2.goods_id, t2.unit_id, t2.quantity old_quantity, t3.main_unit_id, t4.sub_unit_id, t5.main_case_sub, t5.sub_case_main, (CASE WHEN t2.unit_id = t3.main_unit_id AND t4.sub_unit_id != t3.main_unit_id AND t5.sub_case_main IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(t2.quantity / t5.sub_case_main, 2) ELSE t2.quantity END) quantity, t6.sorting_quantity FROM store_goods_order t1 JOIN store_goods_order_item t2 ON t1.order_id = t2.order_id LEFT JOIN store_sorting_detail t6 ON t2.item_id = t6.order_item_id AND t6.status = '1' JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t3 ON t2.spu_no = t3.spu_no JOIN store_goods_spu_unit t4 ON t2.spu_no = t4.spu_no LEFT JOIN store_goods_spu_unit_conversion t5 ON t2.spu_no = t5.spu_no AND t1.dept_id = t5.dept_id WHERE
) tb GROUP BY tb.spu_no

SELECT merchant_id id, nickname FROM store_goods_order t1, store_member t2 WHERE t1.create_time >= #{weekStartTime} AND t1.create_time < #{weekEndTime} AND t1.merchant_id NOT IN ( SELECT merchant_id FROM store_goods_order WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime} ) AND t1.merchant_id = t2.id AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.STATUS IN ( '1', '2', '3', '4' ) GROUP BY t1.merchant_id, t2.nickname

SELECT DATE_FORMAT( t1.create_time, "%Y-%m-%d") AS createtime, count(*) orderGoodCount FROM store_goods_order t1 WHERE t1.create_time >= str_to_date( #{weekStartTime} ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND t1.create_time < str_to_date( #{weekEndTime} ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} AND t1.STATUS IN ( '1', '2', '3', '4' ) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT( t1.create_time, "%Y-%m-%d" ) ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t1.merchant_id merchantId, t2.nickname merchantName, sum(t1.sorting_price) sortingPrice FROM store_goods_order t1, store_member t2 WHERE t1.create_time >= str_to_date(#{weekStartTime} ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND t1.create_time < str_to_date( #{weekEndTime} ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND t1.pay_status = '0' AND t1.status IN('3') AND t1.merchant_id = t2.id AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId} GROUP BY t1.merchant_id ORDER BY sum(t1.sorting_price) DESC

SELECT sum(IFNULL( sorting_quantity, quantity )) sortingquantity, sum(IFNULL( sorting_weight, quantity )) sortingweight, sum(IFNULL( t2.sorting_price, t2.price )) sortingprice, t2.spu_no spuno FROM store_goods_order t1 JOIN store_goods_order_item t2 ON t1.order_id = t2.order_id LEFT JOIN store_sorting_detail t3 ON t2.item_id = t3.order_item_id WHERE
AND t3.STATUS = '1' GROUP BY t2.spu_no
